The '''First Fleet''' was one of the three main [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. For a [[Time/Legends|time]], it was based at [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]; it later participated in [[Operation Durge's Lance]] and the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]].

{{Military-stub}}
